docstrings.CookieJar: CookieJar class for handling HTTP cookies.
docstrings.CookieJar.add_cookie_header: Adds cookie header to the request.
docstrings.CookieJar.clear: Clears cookies for the given domain, path, and name.
docstrings.CookieJar.extract_cookies: Extracts cookies from the response for the request.
docstrings.CookieJar.make_cookies: Makes cookies from the response for the request.
docstrings.CookieJar.set_cookie_if_ok: Sets a cookie if it is valid for the request.
docstrings.WrappedRequest.add_unredirected_header: Adds an unredirected header to the request.
docstrings.WrappedRequest.full_url: Returns the full URL of the request.
docstrings.WrappedRequest.get_full_url: Returns the full URL of the request.
docstrings.WrappedRequest.get_header: Gets the value of a header from the request.
docstrings.WrappedRequest.get_host: Returns the host of the request.
docstrings.WrappedRequest.get_type: Returns the type (scheme) of the request.
docstrings.WrappedRequest.has_header: Checks if the request has a header.
docstrings.WrappedRequest.header_items: Returns all header items as a list of tuples.
docstrings.WrappedRequest.host: Returns the host of the request.
docstrings.WrappedRequest.type: Returns the type (scheme) of the request.
docstrings.WrappedRequest.unverifiable: Checks if the request is unverifiable.
docstrings.WrappedResponse: WrappedResponse class for handling HTTP responses.
docstrings.WrappedResponse.get_all: Gets all values of a header from the response.
